# Frozen cohort statistics (for Methods / Results tables)

**Source:** Generated by `10_verified_source_cohorts.py` from `dataset_manifest.csv`.  
**Frozen snapshot date:** Regenerate after any re-download or manifest rebuild.

## Full master list (after Phase 1)

| Quantity | Value |
|----------|------:|
| Total rows in `master_dataset.csv` | 4606 |
| Design | 50/50 address-level (`label` 0 vs 1) |

## Acquisition outcome (after Phase 2–3)

| Quantity | Value |
|----------|------:|
| Total rows in `dataset_manifest.csv` | 4606 |
| With verified `.sol` on disk (`has_verified_source == 1`) | 3324 |
| Without verified source | 1282 |

## Full verified cohort (primary reporting for analyzable code)

| Class | Meaning | Count |
|-------|---------|------:|
| `label == 0` | Benign arm (SmartBugs-style pool) | 1022 |
| `label == 1` | Malicious arm (ETH rug-pull list) | 2302 |
| **Total** | Analyzable with source | **3324** |
| Imbalance ratio (max/min) | | **~2.25** |

**Interpretation:** Address-level balance does **not** carry through to verified source; malicious contracts are overrepresented among verified uploads in this snapshot.

## Balanced verified cohort (optional fair comparison)

| Setting | Value |
|---------|------:|
| Sampling | `min(1022, 2302) = 1022` per class |
| Random seed | 42 (sample + shuffle) |
| Total rows | **2044** |
| Dropped from majority class | **1280** malicious-only rows (relative to full verified set) |

**Output file:** `verified_manifest_balanced_seed42.csv`

## How to cite in LaTeX (example)

```latex
\begin{table}[t]
\caption{Ethereum verified-source subset (Etherscan). Address-level crawl was balanced; verified contracts are not.}
\begin{tabular}{lrr}
\toprule
Subset & Benign & Malicious \\
\midrule
Verified source (full) & 1022 & 2302 \\
Balanced verified ($n{=}1022$/class, seed 42) & 1022 & 1022 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
```

**Note:** Re-run Phase 10 after data refresh and update this document or the paper’s numbers accordingly.
